projects.title: Lightpainting Timelapse
projects.description: Lightpainting timelapse brings timelapse and long-exposure visuals into real-speed video. If you want to learn how to create these effects yourself, I recommend reading my tutorial: https://medium.com/how-to-shoot-lightpainting-timelapse/how-to-shoot-lightpainting-timelapse-5dd2e88b4a09

projects.description: A tuxedo cat finds its place among pink blossoms. Part of a series celebrating the quiet companionship between domestic animals and the gardens they inhabit.

projects.title: Car Timelapse
projects.description: A celebration of seasonal produce rendered in bold, graphic color. Eggplants, pomegranates, tomatoes and lemons tumble across a fresh mint background.
